description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped garden areas. The structure features a flat roof with a central living space, large windows, and a patio area that opens to a small pool. The front yard is landscaped with shrubs, trees, and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The rear section includes a driveway and a garage, with additional green space and privacy hedges. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with contrasting dark trim and fencing elements. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living, privacy, and a clean, geometric architectural style.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, landscaped gardens, large windows, and a small pool, enclosed by a low wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped garden, and boundary wall with a clear view of the patio and greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool area, patio, and the transition from the garden to the paved driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage, driveway, and additional green space with privacy hedges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the boundary wall, side garden, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
